overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi horror game showing exploration of a sterile medical facility. The player moves through white-paneled rooms, examines a body bag, looks up through a skylight, and enters an operating room with blood-stained equipment.

events.description: player circles around the body bag on the central examination table

agents.ego_description: cautiously moving around the room examining the body bag and equipment while holding a pistol

entered.detail: black body bag on metal examination table
sterile white wall panels with ventilation grates

segments.scene_description: The player explores a sterile white room containing a body bag on a central examination table. An incinerator unit glows orange in the background as the player circles the table cautiously with pistol drawn.

events.description: camera tilts up to reveal open skylight showing blue sky and upper concrete structures
player moves toward and ascends the metal staircase

agents.ego_description: looking up through the skylight opening then proceeding toward the stairs

entered.detail: open ceiling revealing blue sky and concrete walls above
industrial stairs with yellow safety stripes

segments.scene_description: The player looks up through a large skylight opening revealing blue sky and concrete structures above, then proceeds toward a metal staircase with yellow safety markings.

events.description: player turns right into the main corridor
approaching medical supply cart and doorway to next area

agents.ego_description: moving through sterile corridors searching for access to other areas

entered.detail: metal cart with medical supplies and bottles

segments.scene_description: Moving through narrow corridors with white paneled walls, the player passes medical equipment and approaches an elevator door before turning toward a medical supply cart.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical preparation area with access terminal

events.description: discovering dead body on floor near access panel terminal
entering operating room through automatic doorway

agents.ego_description: examining the medical cart and dead body before proceeding into the operating theater

notable_agents.action: dead body in blue scrubs lying on floor near wall

entered.detail: wall-mounted computer screen showing facility map
corpse in blue scrubs lying on floor
open doorway leading to surgical theater

segments.scene_description: The player discovers a dead body in blue scrubs lying near a wall-mounted access panel terminal, then proceeds through an automatic doorway into an operating theater.

events.description: approaching blood-stained operating table to examine it

agents.ego_description: cautiously entering the operating room and examining the blood-stained surgical area

entered.detail: metal surgical table with large blood stains
gurney with body covered by white sheet

segments.scene_description: Inside the operating room, the player examines a blood-stained surgical table under overhead lights. Medical monitors line the walls and a covered body rests on a gurney in the corner.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective through a sterile medical facility that gradually descends into a scene of surgical horror. It begins in a white examination room where the camera cautiously circles a body bag on a central table against the orange glow of a background incinerator. As the player looks up through a skylight toward the blue sky and concrete structures above, the movement shifts toward a metal staircase with yellow safety markings. The scene then transitions through narrow, white-paneled corridors past medical equipment and an elevator, passing a body in blue scrubs before gliding through an automatic doorway. Finally, the environment opens into an operating theater, where the camera focuses on a blood-stained surgical table under harsh overhead lights and a covered body resting on a nearby gurney.
